sentence: 2015, June 10, Lindsey Bever, "Morning Mix: Another reason seeing-eye dogs are _______"http//www.washingtonpost.com/news/morning-mix/wp/2015/06/10/another-heroic-story-showing-why-seeing-eye-dogs-are-_______/
definition: To fill with wonder and surprise; to astonish, astound, surprise or perplex.
To undergo amazement; to be astounded.
